characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a white/silver metallic body, blue eyes, and a smooth, featureless face.
Young Indian woman, medium build, brown complexion, dark wavy hair.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, learning, slightly hesitant but eager.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: तुम कब आओगे? [When will you come?]
Character B says: I will return back on Monday.
Character A says: 'Return back' नहीं बोलना चाहिए... [You shouldn't say 'return back'...]
Character A says: 'Return' का मतलब ही है वापस आना। ['Return' itself means coming back.]
Character A says: 'Return' और 'back' एक साथ बोलने का मतलब है - "तुम बार-बार क्यों आ रहे हो?" [Saying 'return' and 'back' together means - "why are you coming again and again?"]
Character A says: Just say - I will return on Monday. [Just say - I will return on Monday.]
Character B says: ओहो... अच्छा अच्छा। [Oh... okay okay.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, common Indian-English grammar mistake.
- Establishes the AI tutor as a gentle, knowledgeable guide rather than a strict teacher.
- Delivers immediate value by teaching a quick lesson.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: तुम कब आओगे? (When will you come?), I will return back, 'Return back' नहीं बोलना चाहिए... (Shouldn't say 'return back'...), 'Return' का मतलब (Return means), वापस आना (coming back), 'Return' और 'back' (Return and back), एक साथ बोलने का (saying together), मतलब है - "तुम (means - "you), बार-बार क्यों आ रहे हो?" (why are you coming again and again?"), Just say - I will, return on Monday, ओहो... अच्छा अच्छा (Oh... okay okay)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: मुझे English ठीक से नहीं आती। [I don't know English properly.]
Character A says: No problem. क्या आपने Supernova का AI tutor try किया है? [No problem. Have you tried Supernova's AI tutor?]
Character B says: वो तो बहुत expensive होगा ना? [That would be very expensive, right?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं! [Not at all!]
Character A says: Normal English classes से ये बहुत affordable है। [It is very affordable compared to normal English classes.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the core insecurity of the target audience (lack of English confidence).
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor as the solution.
- Overcomes the immediate objection of cost by positioning it as highly affordable.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मुझे English (To me English), ठीक से नहीं आती (doesn't come properly), No problem, Supernova AI tutor, try किया है? (have you tried?), वो तो बहुत expensive (That would be very expensive), होगा ना? (right?), बिल्कुल नहीं! (Not at all!), Normal English classes से (Compared to normal English classes), ये बहुत affordable है (it is very affordable)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इसलिए लाखों लोग Supernova पर रोज़ English practice कर रहे हैं। [That's why lakhs of people are practicing English daily on Supernova.]
Character B says: लेकिन मुझे time ही नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time at all.]
Character A says: Daily सिर्फ 15-20 minutes practice करना काफी है। [Practicing for just 15-20 minutes daily is enough.]
Character A says: आप real-world situations में बहुत confident हो जाओगे। [You will become very confident in real-world situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides social proof to build trust.
- Tackles the second major objection: lack of time.
- Highlights the core brand promise: real-world speaking confidence with minimal daily effort.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: इसलिए लाखों लोग (That's why lakhs of people), Supernova पर रोज़ (daily on Supernova), English practice कर रहे हैं (are practicing English), लेकिन मुझे time (But to me time), नहीं मिलता (don't get), Daily सिर्फ 15-20 minutes (Daily just 15-20 minutes), practice करना काफी है (practicing is enough), आप real-world situations में (You in real-world situations), confident हो जाओगे (will become confident)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: वाओ. मैं कैसे join करूँ? [Wow. How do I join?]
Character A says: बस install button दबाकर Supernova app download करो। [Just click the install button and download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: Sign up करो और अपनी speaking practice start करो। [Sign up and start your speaking practice.]
Character A says: रोज़ाना practice से आपकी English में पक्का improvement दिखेगा। [With daily practice, you will definitely see improvement in your English.]
Character A says: Let's start. [Let's start.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions the user's generated interest into a clear, actionable step.
- Sets a realistic expectation of improvement through consistent daily practice.
- Ends on an encouraging, high-energy note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: वाओ (Wow), मैं कैसे join करूँ? (How do I join?), बस install button दबाकर (Just by pressing install button), Supernova app download करो (download Supernova app), Sign up करो (Sign up), और practice start करो (and start practice), रोज़ाना practice से (With daily practice), पक्का improvement दिखेगा (definite improvement will be seen), Let's start
